concerns.text: contracts/ directory in Project Structure only lists knot_record.schema.yaml, but spec.md and data-model.md reference three contracts (knot_record, dataset, regression_model). For complete spec coverage traceability, the plan should list all three contract schemas in the contracts/ directory.

tests/contract/ only lists test_knot_record_schema.py, but there should be corresponding tests for dataset.schema.yaml and regression_model.schema.yaml for complete contract validation coverage per spec requirements.
